differences.title: 1. INITIAL LOAD
differences.leftDesc: Rendered on server, sends minimal JS.
differences.rightDesc: Sends more JS to client for rendering.

differences.title: 2. INTERACTIVITY
differences.leftDesc: Primarily for static content and data fetching.
differences.rightDesc: Ideal for dynamic UIs, user input.

differences.title: 3. DATA FETCHING
differences.leftDesc: Access to backend resources directly on server.
differences.rightDesc: Fetches data after component mounts on client.

differences.title: 4. BUNDLE SIZE
differences.rightDesc: Increases client-side JavaScript, impacting load times.

differences.title: 5. SEO
differences.leftDesc: Content readily available for search engine crawlers.
differences.rightDesc: Relies on JS execution for crawlable content.

differences.title: 6. ACCESSIBILITY
differences.leftDesc: Content accessible even without JavaScript enabled.
differences.rightDesc: Relies on JavaScript for full UI rendering.
